title: Session Lifecycle

steps.responsibility: provider EventSessionIdentified is converted to SessionPinned with providerSessionID and carried into terminal result
source_checks: saas event carries provider session id

steps.responsibility: assignment ResumeSessionID flows through TaskRequest and StartRequest into provider-specific BuildStart surfaces
reserved vocabulary only; daemon has no fork=true or thread/fork session surface today
process exit flushes parser close and session finish emits exactly one terminal result; no separate close draft is emitted

source_checks.name: saas event carries provider session id
result closes after one delivery
source_checks.contains: Result channel must close after one delivery

absent_surfaces.name: direct ResumeSession API
absent_surfaces.reason: resume is StartRequest input, not a separate daemon session API

absent_surfaces.name: fork draft payload
absent_surfaces.reason: fork is reserved and must not appear as implemented session behavior without new evidence

assertions: SessionPinned is emitted as soon as provider EventSessionIdentified reaches providerEventDraft
resume is modeled as provider-neutral StartRequest.ResumeSessionID
fork remains reserved until implementation and evidence are added
close is a process/session terminal result, not a separate provider draft
